sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ أَدَبُ الْمَقَامَاتِ نَوْعًا فَرِيدًا مِنَ السَّرْدِ الْقَصَصِيِّ الَّذِي يَمْزِجُ بَيْنَ الْفُكَاهَةِ وَالْحِكْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Književnost makama predstavlja jedinstvenu vrstu pripovijedanja koja spaja humor i mudrost.
sentences.translationEn: Maqamat literature represents a unique type of storytelling that blends humor and wisdom.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْمَقَامَةُ عَلَى بَطَلٍ مَكَّارٍ يَسْتَخْدِمُ فَصَاحَتَهُ لِتَحْقِيقِ مَآرِبِهِ فِي مُدُنٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Makama se oslanja na lukavog junaka koji koristi svoju rječitost kako bi postigao svoje ciljeve u različitim gradovima.
sentences.translationEn: The Maqama relies on a cunning protagonist who uses his eloquence to achieve his goals in various cities.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ اسْتِخْدَامَ السَّجْعِ فِي هَذِهِ النُّصُوصِ يُعْطِي لِلُّغَةِ جَرْسًا مُوسِيقيًّا يَجْذِبُ الْآذَانَ.
sentences.translation: Upotreba rime u prozi (sedž') u ovim tekstovima daje jeziku muzički ritam koji privlači uši.
sentences.translationEn: The use of rhymed prose (saj') in these texts gives the language a musical resonance that attracts the ears.

sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى الْكَاتِبُ مِنْ خِلَالِ هَذِهِ الْقَصَصِ إِلَى نَقْدِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ بِأُسْلُوبٍ أَدَبِيٍّ رَاقٍ.
sentences.translation: Pisac kroz ove priče nastoji kritizirati društvo na profinjen književni način.
sentences.translationEn: Through these stories, the writer seeks to criticize society in a refined literary style.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْمَقَامَاتُ عَلَى ثَرْوَةٍ لُغَوِيَّةٍ هَائِلَةٍ تَجْعَلُهَا مَرْجِعًا هَامًّا لِطُلَّابِ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Makame sadrže ogromno jezičko bogatstvo koje ih čini važnom referencom za studente arapskog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Maqamat contains an enormous linguistic wealth that makes them an important reference for students of the Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ أَهَمِّيَّتُهَا عَلَى الْجَانِبطِ اللُّغَوِيِّ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَمْتَدُّ لِتَشْمَلَ الْجَوَانِبَ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةَ وَالثَّقَافِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Njihov značaj nije ograničen samo na jezički aspekt, već se proteže i na društvene i kulturne aspekte.
sentences.translationEn: Their importance is not limited to the linguistic aspect only, but extends to include social and cultural aspects.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا، ظَلَّتِ الْمَقَامَةُ رَمْزًا لِلْإِبْدَاعِ الْأَدَبِيِّ فِي الْعُصُورِ الْوُسْطَى.
sentences.translation: Tako je makama ostala simbol književnog stvaralaštva u srednjem vijeku.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Maqama remained a symbol of literary creativity in the Middle Ages.
